candidate_definitions.text: Official implementation of the papers "GECToR – Grammatical Error Correction: Tag, Not Rewrite" (BEA-20) and "Text Simplification by Tagging" (BEA-21)
This repository provides code for training and testing state-of-the-art models for grammatical error correction with the official PyTorch implementation of the following paper:

[**EASSE**](https://www.aclweb.org/anthology/D19-3009/) (**E**asier **A**utomatic **S**entence **S**implification **E**valuation) is a Python 3 package aiming to facilitate and standardise automatic evaluation and comparison of Sentence Simplification systems. ([*What is Sentenc…
